Most developers cross-post by copy-pasting into 5 different editors.

That's not publishing. That's data entry. I built a tool that fixes this.

---

The core insight: a Twitter thread is NOT a shortened blog post.

It's a different artifact. Different structure, different rhythm.

Cross-posting tools that just truncate are doing it wrong.

---

So I built adapters. Each platform gets its own "format.md" that tells the AI HOW to adapt.

Not reformat. Adapt.

---

The whole thing is open source: github.com/Minara-AI/media-agent

Write once, publish everywhere. But intelligently.

#AITools #OpenSource
